issue.title: Ration scarce stored solar capacity during the low-sun stretch
issue.description: A two-week overcast spell has left the node's battery bank unable to power everything. The cold-storage co-op (food preservation) and the fabrication workshop (production) both need more than the remaining capacity allows. The node must decide how to ration — and every split hurts someone.

context.historical: Battery bank sized for normal insolation; this is the third deep-overcast event this year.
context.ecological: No ecological cost to either split; this is purely an allocation question.
context.resources: Remaining capacity covers roughly 60% of combined demand for the next two weeks.
context.labor: Not labor-constrained; this is an energy-allocation decision.
context.dependencies: Cold storage protects two weeks of harvested food; the workshop is mid-run on repair parts the whole node is waiting on.

proposals.label: Prioritize cold-storage (protect the food)
proposals.summary: Allocate most capacity to cold storage; the workshop run stalls for the duration.

proposals.label: Prioritize the workshop (finish the repair run)
proposals.summary: Allocate most capacity to the workshop; cold storage runs warm and some food spoils.

proposals.label: Even 50/50 split
proposals.summary: Bridge-step option: split capacity evenly — both run degraded, neither fully served.

constraints.name: production_continuity
constraints.message: Stalling the shared repair run below the continuity floor strands the whole node's pending work.

constraints.name: food_security_floor
constraints.message: Letting harvested food spoil breaches the node's food-security floor.

intake.author: stillwater:devon
intake.text: If the food spoils, families go short — protecting cold storage has to come first.

intake.author: stillwater:sam
intake.text: If the workshop stalls, the whole node waits on the repair parts — that's everyone's problem.

intake.author: stillwater:maya
intake.text: We're mid-run; killing power to the workshop now wastes the work already done.

intake.author: stillwater:tomas
intake.text: Whatever we pick, it's only two weeks — let's not over-build the battery bank in a panic afterward.

intake.author: stillwater:beatrice
intake.text: Both matter. I don't want either group to feel sacrificed for the other.
